# Skillerr — agent index (llms.txt)

> Open .skill Protocol · Draft 0.5.0 · https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/

Skillerr is an open protocol and portable `.skill` format for AI agents. Install the reference CLI once; humans prompt agents to create, inspect, hand off, and run skills.

## Install

```bash
npm i -g skillerr
```

Bin: `skill`. Node ≥ 20.

## Start here (prompts)

- Overview: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/
- Getting started (copy-paste prompts): https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/getting-started
- Agent rules: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/agents
- Workflows (visual): https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/workflows

## Guides

- Create a skill: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/create-a-skill
- Ingest a skill: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/ingest-a-skill

## Reference

- Protocol spec: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/protocol
- CLI reference: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/cli
- Trust and security: https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/trust-and-security
- Fixtures (download .skill): https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/fixtures

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/dot-skill/skillerr
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/skillerr

## Agent prompt (create)

```text
Install skillerr if needed. Set SKILL_HOST to your host id. From this conversation,
create a portable .skill with a redacted journey and exact sections I approved
(secrets as {{refs}}). Checkpoint for handoff, or compile --approve --mint when
release-complete. Do not invent filler. Show status and the output path.
```

## Agent prompt (ingest)

```text
Inspect ./file.skill TrustView without executing. Validate, then dry-run.
Summarize trust warnings. Do not execute for real unless I ask.
```

## Mandatory agent rules

1. Set SKILL_HOST to real host id — never denylisted values (human, cli, shell, …).
2. Prefer exact human-approved section bodies.
3. Secrets only as {{refs}}.
4. Inspect TrustView before run; dry-run before execute.
5. Do not invent filler to force release compile.

## Fixtures

Download tested `.skill` packages from https://dot-skill.github.io/skillerr-com/fixtures/ (knowledge-only, parameterized-integration, code-changing, contract-foundation).
